items.reasoning: Lane sustain against Clinkz Searing Arrows harass and Riki Blink Strike trades.
Vision spots Riki smoke cloud setup zones. Critical for early invis detection.
Immediate sentry for lane reveals Riki's Tricks of the Trade positioning.
Slow on BH Jinada strikes; tracks down invis heroes after reveal.
Chase down revealed invis heroes; Riki and Clinkz are both squishy when caught.
12s true sight on all nearby invis heroes. Track + Dust = guaranteed kill.
Kill participation through Track gives 150-200 bonus gold. Urn heals or damages.
Urn upgrade; 4% max HP damage per second reveals invis heroes through heal reduction indicator.
Escape from Riki Smoke Cloud AoE silence. Push allies out of danger.
Survives Clinkz Strafe + Skeleton Walk burst initiation. 2.5s of invulnerability to escape.
BH Shard upgrade for extended Track utility and team fight contribution.
Reflects single-target spells; dispels Riki Smoke Cloud silence from allies.
Ethereal form dodges Riki and Clinkz right-click burst. Both deal purely physical.
Permanent true sight aura. BH's Track already provides but Gem covers team.

recommendation.overall_strategy: BH counters invis heroes through Track's true sight and bonus gold. Sentry wards early, Dust for ganks, Track for permanent vision on Riki and Clinkz. Spirit Vessel marks targets and prevents Salve/regen during invis escapes. The gold advantage from Track kills snowballs the team.
